creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is all fine (and thanks for picking up the port), but given the size and complexity of the port, you really need to run this through poudriere testing (bulk -t option for stage-qa testing) and upload the log.  (former maintainer was requested for this as well)

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/testing-poudriere.html
